name: Mercenaries 2 Lua Mods
description: Lua-based mods for Mercenaries 2. Currently in probe phase — verifying modkit deployment behavior before publishing real mods.

mods.name: [PROBE] Test ASI Placement
mods.description: Control probe. Throwaway ASI to confirm where the modkit deploys type="asi" assets. Loads cleanly (valid DLL, DllMain returns TRUE, no side effects) — safe to install then delete.

mods.name: [PROBE] Manifest: Empty
mods.description: Absolute minimum. Manifest is literally `{}`. Tests whether the modkit tolerates a manifest with zero fields — informative even (or especially) if it doesn't.

mods.name: [PROBE] Manifest: Name only
mods.description: Manifest has only a `name` field, no version, no assets. Tests the boundary between "empty" and "any metadata whatsoever".

mods.name: [PROBE] Manifest: Path-only asset
mods.description: Manifest declares one asset with just a `path` — no `name`, `type`, or `target_patch`. Tests the hypothesis that the modkit may have grown loose-file support since the documented sample.

mods.name: [PROBE] Manifest: Full sample fidelity
mods.description: Full-fidelity replica of the modkit's documented sample manifest format (with `name`, `type: "script"`, `target_patch: "scripts"`) pointed at a single Lua file. Reveals where the sample format actually lands assets.
